infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FunnelSwift uses the camera to scan business cards and capture lead photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FunnelSwift accesses your photo library to attach images to leads.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: FunnelSwift accesses your contacts to import leads from your address book.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FunnelSwift uses your location to tag where you captured leads.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: FunnelSwift uses Face ID to secure your account access.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FunnelSwift to access your camera to scan business cards and capture photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow FunnelSwift to use your location to tag where you captured leads.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FunnelSwift to access your photos to attach to leads.
